description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a combination of dark and wooden exterior finishes. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows and a covered porch area, while the side and rear elevations have a mix of solid walls and additional windows. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and walkways, surrounded by a grassy lawn. The structure includes a garage integrated into the main volume and a spacious balcony or terrace on the upper floor. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of dark and wooden exterior finishes, featuring a garage and a spacious balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the garage integrated into the left side of the house.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage entrance, upper balcony, and the transition from paved driveway to grassy lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wide expanse of windows, a covered patio area, and the open backyard.
description_view_3: Right side view with vertical window strips, solid wall sections, and a glimpse of the rear patio furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, large glass door, and minimal decorative elements
